ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /*  Manufacturer of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the specification (e.g., t, CLK, RH) */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Description of the specification (e.g., Clock Cycle Time, RST Hold Time) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., nominal, maximum, minimum) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Acceptable tolerance range */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the specification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "timing_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification the timing parameter belongs to */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the timing parameter (e.g., µs) */,
  "nominal_value" REAL /* Nominal value of the timing parameter */,
  "tolerance_min" REAL /* Minimum tolerance of the timing parameter */,
  "tolerance_max" REAL /* Maximum tolerance of the timing parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the timing parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the timing parameter was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_specification_id FOREIGN KEY ("specification_id") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the design belongs to */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the design */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., draft, approved, released) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the design */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the design was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the simulation belongs to */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the test result belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the test started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the test ended */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_revisions" (
  "design_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design revision */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was approved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_revisions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_changes" (
  "component_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component change */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the change belongs to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., design, specification) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the change was approved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the change */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the change was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_changes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_changes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
